message:
test: add proptest suites for workflow engine and TUI views (36 properties)

proptest_workflow_engine.rs: 18 properties covering WorkflowStepPolicyDecision
serde roundtrip, WorkflowStepPolicySummary parse/serialize/is_allowed consistency,
policy_summary_decision_is_allow legacy JSON compat, and redact_text_for_log
length/truncation/determinism invariants.

proptest_tui_views.rs: 18 properties covering View circular navigation
(next/prev roundtrip, full cycle, N-1 equivalence), name uniqueness,
all() membership, copy semantics, and default variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
